description: Discovery and refinement policy for pure-model frontier search. Favor stronger near-cap carriers, post-quant selection, and throughput discipline without relying on eval-time tricks.
frontier_reference_features: strong post-quant selection and checkpoint choice
mixed low-bit or coarse selective quantization
longer context only when throughput is protected
activation or positional variants that stay local to train.py
do_not_overweight: Do not merely transpose a public winning config into this repo.
Keep at least one material difference in carrier, schedule, module placement, or quant grouping.
Use creativity where this repo has unique leverage: low-rank Q spends, context curricula, local modules, and post-quant selection.
